'''Eridicon IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which an old [[Quarren/Legends|"Squid-face"]] retired to after owning the ''[[Limping Lady]]''.<ref name="Limping Lady">{{ChallengeCite|64|Limping Lady (article)}}</ref>
